organic.title: Software Engineer Salaries in Bangalore - Glassdoor
organic.snippet: The average salary for a Software Engineer is ₹8,75,000 in Bangalore Area. Salaries estimates are based on 30,000+ salaries submitted anonymously. Range: ₹3.5L - ₹16.0L. Top earners (90th percentile) at FAANG-tier earn ₹26L+.
